allow: Bash(python -m py_compile app/main.py app/config.py app/db.py app/auth.py app/keycloak_client.py app/routers/parametres_securite.py app/routers/parametres_otp.py app/routers/otp_utilisateur.py app/routers/parametres_devise.py)
